title: Step Functions without ASL? Welcome Lambda Durable Functions
excerpt: AWS announced Lambda Durable Functions at re:Invent 2025. Run multi-step workflows with checkpoints and state using familiar code — without Amazon State Language.

title: Log buffering with Lambda Powertools
excerpt: Lambda Powertools now supports log buffering. Capture logs at debug level and flush them only when an error occurs — zero noise, full context when it matters.

title: Using Amazon Cognito with the user-password flow
excerpt: A practical guide to authenticating users in Amazon Cognito with the USER_PASSWORD_AUTH flow — when to use it, how to configure it, and what to watch out for.
